user_query: I'd rather do the ROM than the AGO. Change the activity on Day 3 to the ROM.

updates.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Day 3 > Art Gallery of Ontario

description.from: World-class art museum with Canadian and international collections. Indoor cultural experience in Frank Gehry-designed building. Quiet and contemplative atmosphere.
description.to: Large museum of natural history and world cultures with extensive dinosaur, mineral, and cultural exhibits. Indoor museum offering family-friendly displays and rotating special exhibitions.

updates.reasoning: Replaced Art Gallery of Ontario with the Royal Ontario Museum on Day 3 per user request; preserved the original time block and travel method, updated name, description, highlights, and kept expected cost.
